result.summary: Found 2 visual issues: a sticky on-screen prompt overlaps the fine print, and one bottom navigation item appears to be missing its icon.

issues.description: The floating "SCROLL DOWN" banner sits on top of the legal/disclaimer text near the bottom of the page, obscuring content and making the fine print hard to read.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt lower or hide it once the user is near the bottom so it does not cover critical legal text.

issues.description: The bottom navigation row shows a "SPORTS" label without a visible icon, unlike the other tabs, making the nav look incomplete or inconsistent.
issues.suggestion: Add the missing SPORTS icon or adjust the layout so all navigation items have matching visual treatment.
